name: ekko
description: CLI for setting up a local AI-augmented development workflow.

scripts.verify: pnpm build && pnpm check && pnpm test
scripts.dev:link: pnpm install && pnpm build && pnpm link --global
scripts.test: pnpm build && node --test bin/shared/catalog.test.js bin/shared/workflow-targets.test.js bin/shared/workflow-mutation-readiness.test.js bin/features/use-skill/handler.test.js bin/features/stop-managing-file/handler.test.js
